detected_ref_text: I usually enjoy taking a long walk through the park during the afternoon to clear my mind, feel the fresh breeze, and watch the sun slowly set behind the tall trees in the distance.

notes.emotion_support: OmniVoice supports fixed nonverbal tags inside the text prompt, not free-form tags like [excited] or [depressed].
notes.comparison_goal: Listen for articulation/stability differences across num_step and whether nonverbal tags remain audible and distinct.
